title: check-changelog watched-surface derivation over-includes non-shipping files — build-excluded *.test.ts and monitor examples/*.patterns.json learned-pattern stores
description: scripts/check-changelog.ts derives a package's watched published surface from package.json files[], mapping the shipped dist/ to the whole src/ tree (watchDirsFromFiles, scripts/check-changelog.ts:56-72). This over-includes files that do not ship: (1) *.test.ts — every tsconfig.build.json excludes **/*.test.ts, so tests never compile to dist/; (2) the behavior-monitor learned-pattern stores packages/pi-behavior-monitors/examples/*.patterns.json (hedge, fragility, commit-hygiene, unauthorized-action, work-quality) — a monitor test rewrites them on each run, and examples/ is in that package's files[]. A change confined to either class is flagged 'published-surface change without a [Unreleased] entry,' demanding a changelog line for a change that never reaches dist/. General class: the dist/->src/ whole-tree watch counts build-excluded files and data-dir files that are not shipped API; the two classes above are its instances.

evidence.reference: watchDirsFromFiles maps a files[] dist/ entry to the whole packages/<pkg>/src/ prefix (or *.ts for root-source packages), with no exclusion for *.test.ts.
exclude includes **/*.test.ts — test files never compile to dist/ and never ship.
files[] ships examples/, so check-changelog watches packages/pi-behavior-monitors/examples/ — including the *.patterns.json learned-pattern stores.
rewritten by a behavior-monitor test run (learned-pattern append), producing a tracked-file diff that the gate counts as a published-surface change.

impact: A change confined to non-shipping test files or to a monitor learned-pattern store cannot be committed without adding a spurious [Unreleased] line for a change that does not ship. The gate's published-surface model is broader than the shipped dist/ artifact.
canonical_vocabulary: published-surface derivation matching the shipped artifact
proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
